package.name: ModelContext
package.description: Serialize a FreeCAD document's semantic model -- the feature tree, each feature's parameters (with expressions), the Sketcher geometry WITH its constraint graph, and materials -- into a canonical, versioned, tool-agnostic JSON schema (plus an LLM-legible Markdown rendering). Grounding context for LLM / agent / MCP tools: a published schema (see SCHEMA.md) anyone can adopt, rather than the ad-hoc per-tool dumps each FreeCAD AI/MCP integration reinvents. Importable library + an "Export Model Context" GUI command.
